title: What to Check Before Applying for a Korea Visa
subtitle: Visa rules can depend on your purpose of stay, job type, documents, and current immigration status.
bullets: Check the visa type that matches your purpose.
Confirm details with HiKorea or immigration office.
llama_rule: Each bullet must be short, practical, and related to visa, stay status, immigration documents, or official application steps.
Do not guarantee eligibility or approval.
Always encourage checking official immigration sources.
Do not include system or operation messages.
